title: Animal Garden - Springhare
description: This mod adds another useful tamable critter to the savanna biomes, the Springhare!
body:
![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EF3qDSk4/images/41133bee5ea141c50cb2c5426daf39b0de705187.gif)

This mod adds another useful tamable critter to the savanna biomes, the Springhare!

 

They are herbivorous, so they need plant based items for taming.

Eats grass type block sometimes for faster growth and heal and can jump really high.

The edible block list can be changed with the edible_blocks.json file in the tags/block(s) folder,

just like how the tamable food items list can be changed with the food_items.json file in the tags/item(s) folder.

 

They are nocturnal!

So they sleep during the day and are active at night.

 

And their special behavior is Digging

    -around every 5-10 minutes they dig up an item (80% chance)

    -item list can be changed with the random_item.json file in the tags/item(s) folder

 

and Block Searching (tamed ones can smell out a block of interest even from underground in a small distance)

    -when the owner is near, they will let out a loud squeak to alert the owner that there is a rare block nearby, such as emerald, diamond, nether quartz or amethyst.

    -can be used once every 30 second

    -block list can be changed with the search_block.json file in the tags/block(s) folder

 

As mentioned they spawn in the savanna biomes

You can change this and other spawn settings
by editing the json files in the data -> biome tags and biome modifier folders
or via resource pack,

but in fabric some spawn settings like the weight, min, max have to be edited in the config file

 

This mod currently supports:

**Forge       26.1.x | 1.21.x | 1.20.6 | 1.20.1**

**Neoforge 26.1.x | 1.21.x**

**Fabric      26.1.x | 1.21.x | 1.20.6 | 1.20.1**

 

SEND ME A PRIVATE MESSAGE IF YOU NEED THE MOD IN A DIFFERENT VERSION OR IF YOU ENCOUNTER ANY BUGS AT CURSEFORGE

[https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aquarius_playz/projects](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aquarius_playz/projects)
